name: AARO Launches a Secure UAP Reporting Mechanism
summary: AARO launched a secure reporting mechanism for current and former U.S. government personnel to report direct knowledge of UAP-related programs or activities, a significant expansion of the office’s information-gathering role under Sean Kirkpatrick.

relationships.context: Led AARO when the reporting mechanism launched

referenceSources.label: DoD announcement of AARO reporting tool
